title: Vegapunk’s Future Island
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Law, Blackbeard, Unknown person #2, York, Unknown person #3 as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ZE ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A battle that shakes the world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's no escape, so don't bother runnin'!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hakugan!! Take care of the polar tang!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Get in the sea and provide cover!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one told me his power could do that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is He Usin' an awakened technique?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ZE HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is the power of a quake man...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The shock waves are too intense!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ARGH... DON'T DIE ON ME NOW, STRONGER...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You've always been such a good boy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a big mistake to underestimate us when we grew up in the harsh cold waters of the North Blue!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You ain't got a chance against us in a sea battle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All we gotta do is sink your ship....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Jean Bart! Sniper at three o'clock!

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
